chapters.title: 二○○九年夏季训练标语
chapters.content:
第一组
神的福音，就是神圣真理的总和，乃是照着奥秘之启示关于耶稣基督的传扬，这奥秘就是：基督是神的奥秘，召会是基督的奥秘。
The gospel of God, the totality of the divine truths,is the proclamation of Jesus Christaccording to the revelation of the mystery—Christ as the mystery of Godand the church as the mystery of Christ.
基督是在人性里的三重后裔─女人的后裔、亚伯拉罕的后裔和大卫的后裔，这乃是福音，是整本圣经所启示的好信息。
The gospel of Christ as the threefold seed in humanity—the seed of the woman, the seed of Abraham, and the seed of David—is the good news of the revelation of the entire Bible.
神的福音就是神国度的福音，将我们带到神掌权的管治之下，也是基督荣耀的福音，照明、照射并照耀在我们心里。
The gospel of God is the gospel of the kingdom of God,which brings us under the rule of God's authority,and the gospel of the glory of Christ, which illuminates,radiates, and shines into our hearts.
我们是在神儿子的福音上，在我们灵里凭神的灵事奉敬拜神；这样的事奉敬拜，结果乃是基督身体的实际。
Our service to God, our worship to God,is by the Spirit of God in our spirit in the gospel of His Son,and the issue of this service, this worship,is the reality of the Body of Christ.
第二组
真正、内在、最高品、最全备的福音乃是神经纶的福音，就是儿子名分的福音，为着将神建造到人里面，并将人建造到神里面，以建造召会作基督的身体。
The genuine, intrinsic, highest, and fullest gospelis the gospel of God's economy—the gospel of sonshipfor the building up of the church as the Body of Christby the building of God into man and man into God.
福音的目标乃是要我们用起初的爱爱主耶稣，把我们所最宝贝的，甚至把我们最贵重、最有价值的属灵珍宝，浇在祂身上，把我们自己“枉费”在祂身上。
The goal of the gospel is that,loving the Lord Jesus with the first love,we would pour out upon Him what is most precious to us,even our most costly and valuable spiritual treasure,"wasting" ourselves upon Him.
